title: Mitigation of Clickjacking Vulnerability in Payment Checkout

steps.message: Verify the missing X-Frame-Options and Content-Security-Policy (CSP) headers on /payments/checkout using an automated scan.

Implement X-Frame-Options: SAMEORIGIN and Content-Security-Policy: frame-ancestors 'self' in the web server configuration to prevent UI redressing. As per WAHH guidelines, also ensure no relative URLs are vulnerable to base tag hijacking.
Review the configuration change for /payments/checkout to ensure it does not break third-party payment integrations.
Trigger a re-scan of the production endpoint to confirm the mitigation is active.
Update the security posture report and audit logs to reflect the remediation of the clickjacking vulnerability.

params.resolution_note: X-Frame-Options and CSP frame-ancestors headers implemented.
